proposals.title: Thesis Sub-Thesis Tracking
proposals.problem: T-001 had distinct sub-theses (energy war premium vs gold dollar/inflation hedge). When ceasefire broke the energy component, the gold component remained valid. The shared T-001 label created ambiguity on whether to exit IAU.
proposals.proposal: Add sub_theses[] array to thesis schema with individual status fields (Active/Challenged/Broken) per sub-thesis. Parent thesis status = minimum (most bearish) sub-thesis status.

proposals.title: Binary Event Deferral Flag (formalized)
proposals.problem: April 6 delta correctly deferred XLE/DBO adds pending Tuesday ceasefire resolution — but only via informal PM note. No structured field to track this.
proposals.proposal: Add deferral_flag field to proposed_positions[]: {ticker, deferral: 'Pending binary event', deferral_until: 'YYYY-MM-DD'}. PM skill should auto-apply when known binary event is <48 hours away.

proposals.title: git-commit.sh Sandbox Bypass Mode
proposals.problem: git-commit.sh calls update_tearsheet.py and exits on failure. Supabase unreachable in sandbox (proxy 403). Forces manual git commands, bypassing portfolio validation step.
proposals.proposal: Add --skip-supabase flag to git-commit.sh that bypasses tearsheet and proceeds to git add/commit with a warning. Scheduled/automated runs should use this flag.
